channel.title: Mini Punjab on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Mini Punjab on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: Mini Punjab - Movie Review
item.description:
bade time baad Gurdas Maan di koi film aai hai te mainu dekhan da mauka lag gia jaldi hi. so review likha rihan.

samjh nahi a rahi film dian changian gallan ton shuru kita jave ja khaamian ton. khair changian ton e shuru karna chahida hai. Rimpy Prince di eh pehli movie hai te uhna ne wadia kam kita hai so es karke oh wadhai de patar ne. Gurdas Maan, Vivek Shauq te Manav Vij di acting sarahun yog hai.
